tEn: Deep Compression: Compressing Deep Neural Networks with Pruning, Trained Quantization and Huffman Coding
tZh: 深度压缩：通过剪枝、训练量化和霍夫曼编码压缩深度神经网络
sEn: Deep compression reduces neural network storage by 35x-49x without accuracy loss via pruning, quantization, and Huffman coding.
sZh: 深度压缩通过剪枝、量化和霍夫曼编码，在不损失精度的情况下将神经网络存储减少35倍至49倍。
absEn: Neural networks are both computationally intensive and memory intensive, making them difficult to deploy on embedded systems with limited hardware resources. To address this limitation, we introduce "deep compression", a three stage pipeline: pruning, trained quantization and Huffman coding, that work together to reduce the storage requirement of neural networks by 35x to 49x without affecting their accuracy. Our method first prunes the network by learning only the important connections. Next, we quantize the weights to enforce weight sharing, finally, we apply Huffman coding. After the first two steps we retrain the network to fine tune the remaining connections and the quantized centroids. Pruning, reduces the number of connections by 9x to 13x; Quantization then reduces the number of bits that represent each connection from 32 to 5. On the ImageNet dataset, our method reduced the storage required by AlexNet by 35x, from 240MB to 6.9MB, without loss of accuracy. Our method reduced the size of VGG-16 by 49x from 552MB to 11.3MB, again with no loss of accuracy. This allows fitting the model into on-chip SRAM cache rather than off-chip DRAM memory. Our compression method also facilitates the use of complex neural networks in mobile applications where application size and download bandwidth are constrained. Benchmarked on CPU, GPU and mobile GPU, compressed network has 3x to 4x layerwise speedup and 3x to 7x better energy efficiency.
absZh: 神经网络既计算密集又内存密集，使其难以部署在硬件资源有限的嵌入式系统上。为了解决这一限制，我们引入了“深度压缩”，一个三阶段流程：剪枝、训练量化和霍夫曼编码，它们共同作用将神经网络的存储需求降低35倍至49倍，而不影响其准确性。我们的方法首先通过仅学习重要连接来剪枝网络。接下来，我们对权重进行量化以强制权重共享，最后应用霍夫曼编码。在前两个步骤之后，我们重新训练网络以微调剩余连接和量化中心。剪枝将连接数量减少9倍至13倍；量化则将表示每个连接的位数从32位减少到5位。在ImageNet数据集上，我们的方法将AlexNet所需的存储从240MB减少到6.9MB，减少了35倍，且没有精度损失。我们的方法将VGG-16的大小从552MB减少到11.3MB，减少了49倍，同样没有精度损失。这使得模型能够适配到片上SRAM缓存而非片外DRAM内存。我们的压缩方法还促进了在应用大小和下载带宽受限的移动应用中使用复杂神经网络。在CPU、GPU和移动GPU上进行的基准测试显示，压缩网络在层级别上实现了3倍至4倍的加速和3倍至7倍的能效提升。

contrib.en: Proposes a three-stage pipeline: pruning, trained quantization, and Huffman coding, achieving 35x to 49x compression without accuracy loss.
contrib.zh: 提出三阶段流程：剪枝、训练量化和霍夫曼编码，实现 35 倍到 49 倍压缩且不损失精度。

contrib.en: Reduces AlexNet from 240MB to 6.9MB and VGG-16 from 552MB to 11.3MB on ImageNet, enabling on-chip SRAM storage.
contrib.zh: 在 ImageNet 上将 AlexNet 从 240MB 压缩至 6.9MB，VGG-16 从 552MB 压缩至 11.3MB，支持片上 SRAM 存储。

contrib.en: Combines pruning and quantization synergistically, showing pruning reduces connections by 9x-13x and quantization reduces bits per weight to 5.
contrib.zh: 协同结合剪枝与量化，剪枝减少连接 9-13 倍，量化将每个权重的比特数降至 5。

contrib.en: Demonstrates linear initialization for k-means clustering preserves large weights, improving quantization accuracy.
contrib.zh: 证明 k-means 聚类的线性初始化能保留大权重，提升量化精度。

contrib.en: Achieves 3x-4x layerwise speedup and 3x-7x energy efficiency on CPU, GPU, and mobile GPU.
contrib.zh: 在 CPU、GPU 和移动 GPU 上实现 3-4 倍逐层加速和 3-7 倍能效提升。

limits.en: Quantized network with weight sharing not benchmarked due to lack of library support for indirect lookup.
limits.zh: 由于缺乏支持间接查找的库，未对带权值共享的量化网络进行基准测试。

limits.en: Pruning advantage diminishes in batched matrix-matrix multiplication due to improved memory locality.
limits.zh: 在批处理矩阵乘法中，由于内存局部性改善，剪枝优势减弱。

limits.en: Method focuses on storage compression; inference speedup limited without specialized hardware or custom kernels.
limits.zh: 方法聚焦存储压缩；若无专用硬件或定制内核，推理加速有限。

limits.en: Huffman coding provides marginal gain (e.g., 32x to 40x) compared to pruning and quantization.
limits.zh: 与剪枝和量化相比，霍夫曼编码增益有限（例如 32 倍到 40 倍）。

limits.en: Weight sharing across layers not explored; each layer quantized independently.
limits.zh: 未探索跨层权值共享；每层独立量化。

items.en: Neural networks are both computationally intensive and memory intensive, making them difficult to deploy on embedded systems with limited hardware resources. To address this limitation, we introduce “deep compression”, a three stage pipeline: pruning, trained quantization and Huffman coding, that work together to reduce the storage requirement of neural networks by 35×35\times to 49×49\times without affecting their accuracy. Our method first prunes the network by learning only the important connections. Next, we quantize the weights to enforce weight sharing, finally, we apply Huffman coding. After the first two steps we retrain the network to fine tune the remaining connections and the quantized centroids. Pruning, reduces the number of connections by 9×9\times to 13×13\times; Quantization then reduces the number of bits that represent each connection from 32 to 5. On the ImageNet dataset, our method reduced the storage required by AlexNet by 𝟑𝟓×\bf{35\times}, from 240MB to 6.9MB, without loss of accuracy. Our method reduced the size of VGG-16 by 𝟒𝟗×\bf{49\times} from 552MB to 11.3MB, again with no loss of accuracy. This allows fitting the model into on-chip SRAM cache rather than off-chip DRAM memory. Our compression method also facilitates the use of complex neural networks in mobile applications where application size and download bandwidth are constrained. Benchmarked on CPU, GPU and mobile GPU, compressed network has 3×3\times to 4×4\times layerwise speedup and 3×3\times to 7×7\times better energy efficiency.
items.zh: 神经网络既计算密集又内存密集，使其难以部署在硬件资源有限的嵌入式系统上。为解决这一限制，我们引入了“深度压缩”，一个三阶段流程：剪枝、训练量化和霍夫曼编码，它们共同作用可将神经网络的存储需求降低35倍至49倍，且不影响其准确性。我们的方法首先通过学习仅保留重要连接来剪枝网络。接下来，我们对权重进行量化以强制权重共享，最后应用霍夫曼编码。在前两个步骤之后，我们重新训练网络以微调剩余连接和量化中心。剪枝将连接数量减少9倍至13倍；量化则将表示每个连接的位数从32位减少到5位。在ImageNet数据集上，我们的方法将AlexNet所需的存储从240MB减少到6.9MB，减少了35倍，且没有损失准确性。我们的方法将VGG-16的大小从552MB减少到11.3MB，减少了49倍，同样没有损失准确性。这使得模型能够放入片上SRAM缓存而非片外DRAM内存。我们的压缩方法还促进了在应用大小和下载带宽受限的移动应用中使用复杂神经网络。在CPU、GPU和移动GPU上进行的基准测试表明，压缩网络在逐层速度上提升了3倍到4倍，能效提升了3倍到7倍。

items.en: Deep neural networks have evolved to the state-of-the-art technique for computer vision tasks (Krizhevsky et al., 2012)(Simonyan & Zisserman, 2014). Though these neural networks are very powerful, the large number of weights consumes considerable storage and memory bandwidth. For example, the AlexNet Caffemodel is over 200MB, and the VGG-16 Caffemodel is over 500MB (BVLC, ). This makes it difficult to deploy deep neural networks on mobile system.
items.zh: 深度神经网络已发展成为计算机视觉任务的最先进技术（Krizhevsky 等，2012；Simonyan & Zisserman，2014）。尽管这些神经网络非常强大，但大量的权重消耗了可观的存储和内存带宽。例如，AlexNet Caffemodel 超过 200MB，而 VGG-16 Caffemodel 超过 500MB（BVLC，）。这使得在移动系统上部署深度神经网络变得困难。

items.en: First, for many mobile-first companies such as Baidu and Facebook, various apps are updated via different app stores, and they are very sensitive to the size of the binary files. For example, App Store has the restriction “apps above 100 MB will not download until you connect to Wi-Fi”. As a result, a feature that increases the binary size by 100MB will receive much more scrutiny than one that increases it by 10MB. Although having deep neural networks running on mobile has many great features such as better privacy, less network bandwidth and real time processing, the large storage overhead prevents deep neural networks from being incorporated into mobile apps.
items.zh: 首先，对于百度、Facebook 等许多移动优先的公司，各种应用通过不同的应用商店更新，它们对二进制文件的大小非常敏感。例如，App Store 有“超过 100 MB 的应用在连接 Wi-Fi 之前不会下载”的限制。因此，一个使二进制大小增加 100MB 的功能将比增加 10MB 的功能受到更多的审查。尽管在移动设备上运行深度神经网络具有更好的隐私性、更少的网络带宽和实时处理等许多优点，但巨大的存储开销阻碍了深度神经网络被集成到移动应用中。

items.en: The second issue is energy consumption. Running large neural networks require a lot of memory bandwidth to fetch the weights and a lot of computation to do dot products— which in turn consumes considerable energy. Mobile devices are battery constrained, making power hungry applications such as deep neural networks hard to deploy.
items.zh: 第二个问题是能耗。运行大型神经网络需要大量的内存带宽来获取权重，以及大量的计算来进行点积——这反过来消耗大量能量。移动设备受电池限制，使得深度神经网络等耗电应用难以部署。

items.en: Energy consumption is dominated by memory access. Under 45nm CMOS technology, a 32 bit floating point add consumes 0.9​𝐩𝐉0.9𝐩𝐉\bf{0.9pJ}, a 32bit SRAM cache access takes 𝟓​𝐩​𝐉5𝐩𝐉\bf{5pJ}, while a 32bit DRAM memory access takes 𝟔𝟒𝟎​𝐩​𝐉640𝐩𝐉\bf{640pJ}, which is 3 orders of magnitude of an add operation. Large networks do not fit in on-chip storage and hence require the more costly DRAM accesses. Running a 1 billion connection neural network, for example, at 20fps would require (20​H​z)​(1​G)​(640​p​J)=12.8​W20𝐻𝑧1𝐺640𝑝𝐽12.8𝑊(20Hz)(1G)(640pJ)=12.8W just for DRAM access - well beyond the power envelope of a typical mobile device.
items.zh: 能耗主要由内存访问主导。在 45nm CMOS 工艺下，一次 32 位浮点加法消耗 0.9pJ，一次 32 位 SRAM 缓存访问消耗 5pJ，而一次 32 位 DRAM 内存访问消耗 640pJ，比加法操作高三个数量级。大型网络无法放入片上存储，因此需要更昂贵的 DRAM 访问。例如，以 20fps 运行一个 10 亿连接的神经网络，仅 DRAM 访问就需要 (20Hz)(1G)(640pJ)=12.8W——远超典型移动设备的功率预算。

items.capEn: Figure 1: The three stage compression pipeline: pruning, quantization and Huffman coding. Pruning reduces the number of weights by 10×10\times, while quantization further improves the compression rate: between 27×27\times and 31×31\times. Huffman coding gives more compression: between 35×35\times and 49×49\times. The compression rate already included the meta-data for sparse representation. The compression scheme doesn’t incur any accuracy loss.
items.capZh: 图1：三阶段压缩流程：剪枝、量化和霍夫曼编码。剪枝将权重数量减少10×10倍，而量化进一步提高了压缩率：介于27×27倍和31×31倍之间。霍夫曼编码提供了更多压缩：介于35×35倍和49×49倍之间。压缩率已包含稀疏表示的元数据。该压缩方案不会造成任何精度损失。

items.en: Our goal is to reduce the storage and energy required to run inference on such large networks so they can be deployed on mobile devices. To achieve this goal, we present “deep compression”: a three-stage pipeline (Figure 1) to reduce the storage required by neural network in a manner that preserves the original accuracy. First, we prune the networking by removing the redundant connections, keeping only the most informative connections. Next, the weights are quantized so that multiple connections share the same weight, thus only the codebook (effective weights) and the indices need to be stored. Finally, we apply Huffman coding to take advantage of the biased distribution of effective weights.
items.zh: 我们的目标是减少在如此大型网络上运行推理所需的存储和能量，以便它们可以部署在移动设备上。为实现这一目标，我们提出了“深度压缩”：一个三阶段流程（图 1），以保持原始准确率的方式减少神经网络所需的存储。首先，我们通过移除冗余连接来剪枝网络，只保留信息量最大的连接。接下来，对权重进行量化，使得多个连接共享相同的权重，因此只需存储码本（有效权重）和索引。最后，我们应用霍夫曼编码来利用有效权重的偏态分布。

items.en: Our main insight is that, pruning and trained quantization are able to compress the network without interfering each other, thus lead to surprisingly high compression rate. It makes the required storage so small (a few megabytes) that all weights can be cached on chip instead of going to off-chip DRAM which is energy consuming. Based on “deep compression”, the EIE hardware accelerator Han et al. (2016) was later proposed that works on the compressed model, achieving significant speedup and energy efficiency improvement.
items.zh: 我们的主要见解是，剪枝和训练量化能够在不相互干扰的情况下压缩网络，从而产生令人惊讶的高压缩率。这使得所需存储非常小（几兆字节），以至于所有权重都可以缓存在芯片上，而不是访问耗能的片外 DRAM。基于“深度压缩”，后来提出了 EIE 硬件加速器 Han 等人（2016），它可以在压缩模型上工作，实现了显著的加速和能效提升。

items.en: Network pruning has been widely studied to compress CNN models. In early work, network pruning proved to be a valid way to reduce the network complexity and over-fitting (LeCun et al., 1989; Hanson & Pratt, 1989; Hassibi et al., 1993; Ström, 1997). Recently Han et al. (2015) pruned state-of-the-art CNN models with no loss of accuracy. We build on top of that approach. As shown on the left side of Figure 1, we start by learning the connectivity via normal network training. Next, we prune the small-weight connections: all connections with weights below a threshold are removed from the network. Finally, we retrain the network to learn the final weights for the remaining sparse connections. Pruning reduced the number of parameters by 9×9\times and 13×13\times for AlexNet and VGG-16 model.
items.zh: 网络剪枝已被广泛研究用于压缩CNN模型。在早期工作中，网络剪枝被证明是降低网络复杂性和过拟合的有效方法（LeCun等人，1989；Hanson & Pratt，1989；Hassibi等人，1993；Ström，1997）。最近，Han等人（2015）在不损失准确率的情况下剪枝了最先进的CNN模型。我们基于该方法进行构建。如图1左侧所示，我们首先通过常规网络训练学习连接性。接着，我们剪枝小权重连接：所有权重低于阈值的连接从网络中移除。最后，我们重新训练网络，为剩余的稀疏连接学习最终权重。剪枝使AlexNet和VGG-16模型的参数数量分别减少了9倍和13倍。

items.en: We store the sparse structure that results from pruning using compressed sparse row (CSR) or compressed sparse column (CSC) format, which requires 2​a+n+12𝑎𝑛12a+n+1 numbers, where a𝑎a is the number of non-zero elements and n𝑛n is the number of rows or columns.
items.zh: 我们使用压缩稀疏行（CSR）或压缩稀疏列（CSC）格式存储剪枝产生的稀疏结构，这需要2a+n+1个数字，其中a是非零元素的数量，n是行数或列数。

items.en: To compress further, we store the index difference instead of the absolute position, and encode this difference in 8 bits for conv layer and 5 bits for fc layer. When we need an index difference larger than the bound, we the zero padding solution shown in Figure 2: in case when the difference exceeds 8, the largest 3-bit (as an example) unsigned number, we add a filler zero.
items.zh: 为了进一步压缩，我们存储索引差值而非绝对位置，并对卷积层和全连接层分别用8位和5位编码该差值。当需要的索引差值超过界限时，我们采用图2所示的零填充解决方案：当差值超过8（作为示例的最大3位无符号数）时，我们添加一个填充零。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Representing the matrix sparsity with relative index. Padding filler zero to prevent overflow.
items.capZh: 图2：用相对索引表示矩阵稀疏性。填充零以防止溢出。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Weight sharing by scalar quantization (top) and centroids fine-tuning (bottom).
items.capZh: 图3：通过标量量化（上）和质心微调（下）实现权重共享。

items.en: Network quantization and weight sharing further compresses the pruned network by reducing the number of bits required to represent each weight. We limit the number of effective weights we need to store by having multiple connections share the same weight, and then fine-tune those shared weights.
items.zh: 网络量化与权重共享通过减少表示每个权重所需的比特数，进一步压缩剪枝后的网络。我们通过让多个连接共享同一权重来限制需要存储的有效权重数量，然后对这些共享权重进行微调。

items.en: Weight sharing is illustrated in Figure 3. Suppose we have a layer that has 4 input neurons and 4 output neurons, the weight is a 4×4444\times 4 matrix. On the top left is the 4×4444\times 4 weight matrix, and on the bottom left is the 4×4444\times 4 gradient matrix. The weights are quantized to 4 bins (denoted with 4 colors), all the weights in the same bin share the same value, thus for each weight, we then need to store only a small index into a table of shared weights. During update, all the gradients are grouped by the color and summed together, multiplied by the learning rate and subtracted from the shared centroids from last iteration. For pruned AlexNet, we are able to quantize to 8-bits (256 shared weights) for each CONV layers, and 5-bits (32 shared weights) for each FC layer without any loss of accuracy.
items.zh: 权重共享如图3所示。假设有一个层具有4个输入神经元和4个输出神经元，权重是一个4×4矩阵。左上角是4×4权重矩阵，左下角是4×4梯度矩阵。权重被量化为4个箱子（用4种颜色表示），同一箱子中的所有权重共享相同的值，因此对于每个权重，我们只需存储一个指向共享权重表的小索引。在更新过程中，所有梯度按颜色分组并求和，乘以学习率，然后从上一次迭代的共享质心中减去。对于剪枝后的AlexNet，我们能够将每个卷积层量化为8位（256个共享权重），每个全连接层量化为5位（32个共享权重），而不会损失任何精度。

items.en: To calculate the compression rate, given k𝑘k clusters, we only need l​o​g2​(k)𝑙𝑜subscript𝑔2𝑘log_{2}(k) bits to encode the index. In general, for a network with n𝑛n connections and each connection is represented with b𝑏b bits, constraining the connections to have only k𝑘k shared weights will result in a compression rate of:
items.zh: 为了计算压缩率，给定k个聚类，我们只需要log2(k)位来编码索引。一般来说，对于一个具有n个连接且每个连接用b位表示的网络，将连接限制为只有k个共享权重将产生以下压缩率：

items.en: For example, Figure 3 shows the weights of a single layer neural network with four input units and four output units. There are 4×4=1644164\times 4=16 weights originally but there are only 444 shared weights: similar weights are grouped together to share the same value. Originally we need to store 16 weights each has 32 bits, now we need to store only 4 effective weights (blue, green, red and orange), each has 32 bits, together with 16 2-bit indices giving a compression rate of 16∗32/(4∗32+2∗16)=3.216324322163.216*32/(4*32+2*16)=3.2
items.zh: 例如，图3显示了一个具有四个输入单元和四个输出单元的单层神经网络的权重。最初有4×4=16个权重，但只有4个共享权重：相似的权重被分组在一起共享相同的值。最初我们需要存储16个权重，每个权重32位，现在只需要存储4个有效权重（蓝色、绿色、红色和橙色），每个32位，加上16个2位索引，压缩率为16*32/(4*32+2*16)=3.2。

items.en: We use k-means clustering to identify the shared weights for each layer of a trained network, so that all the weights that fall into the same cluster will share the same weight. Weights are not shared across layers. We partition n𝑛n original weights W={w1,w2,…,wn}𝑊subscript𝑤1subscript𝑤2…subscript𝑤𝑛W=\{w_{1},w_{2},...,w_{n}\} into k𝑘k clusters C={c1,c2,…,ck}𝐶subscript𝑐1subscript𝑐2…subscript𝑐𝑘C=\{c_{1},c_{2},...,c_{k}\}, n≫kmuch-greater-than𝑛𝑘n\gg k, so as to minimize the within-cluster sum of squares (WCSS):
items.zh: 我们使用 k-means 聚类来识别训练好的网络每一层的共享权重，使得落入同一聚类的所有权重共享同一个值。权重不跨层共享。我们将 n 个原始权重 W={w1,w2,...,wn} 划分为 k 个聚类 C={c1,c2,...,ck}，n≫k，以最小化簇内平方和（WCSS）：

items.en: Different from HashNet (Chen et al., 2015) where weight sharing is determined by a hash function before the networks sees any training data, our method determines weight sharing after a network is fully trained, so that the shared weights approximate the original network.
items.zh: 与 HashNet（Chen 等人，2015）不同，后者在网络看到任何训练数据之前通过哈希函数确定权重共享，我们的方法在网络完全训练后确定权重共享，使得共享权重近似原始网络。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Left: Three different methods for centroids initialization. Right: Distribution of weights (blue) and distribution of codebook before (green cross) and after fine-tuning (red dot).
items.capZh: 图4：左：三种不同的质心初始化方法。右：权重分布（蓝色）以及微调前（绿色叉号）和微调后（红色圆点）的码本分布。

items.en: Centroid initialization impacts the quality of clustering and thus affects the network’s prediction accuracy. We examine three initialization methods: Forgy(random), density-based, and linear initialization. In Figure 4 we plotted the original weights’ distribution of conv3 layer in AlexNet (CDF in blue, PDF in red). The weights forms a bimodal distribution after network pruning. On the bottom it plots the effective weights (centroids) with 3 different initialization methods (shown in blue, red and yellow). In this example, there are 13 clusters.
items.zh: 质心初始化影响聚类质量，从而影响网络的预测精度。我们研究了三种初始化方法：Forgy（随机）、基于密度和线性初始化。在图4中，我们绘制了AlexNet中conv3层的原始权重分布（CDF为蓝色，PDF为红色）。网络剪枝后权重形成双峰分布。底部显示了三种不同初始化方法（蓝色、红色和黄色）的有效权重（质心）。在此示例中，有13个聚类。

items.en: Forgy (random) initialization randomly chooses k observations from the data set and uses these as the initial centroids. The initialized centroids are shown in yellow. Since there are two peaks in the bimodal distribution, Forgy method tend to concentrate around those two peaks.
items.zh: Forgy（随机）初始化从数据集中随机选择k个观测值作为初始质心。初始化的质心以黄色显示。由于双峰分布中有两个峰值，Forgy方法倾向于集中在这些峰值附近。

items.en: Density-based initialization linearly spaces the CDF of the weights in the y-axis, then finds the horizontal intersection with the CDF, and finally finds the vertical intersection on the x-axis, which becomes a centroid, as shown in blue dots. This method makes the centroids denser around the two peaks, but more scatted than the Forgy method.
items.zh: 基于密度的初始化在y轴上线性间隔权重的CDF，然后找到与CDF的水平交点，最后在x轴上找到垂直交点，该交点成为质心，如蓝点所示。该方法使质心在两个峰值附近更密集，但比Forgy方法更分散。

items.en: Linear initialization linearly spaces the centroids between the [min, max] of the original weights. This initialization method is invariant to the distribution of the weights and is the most scattered compared with the former two methods.
items.zh: 线性初始化在原始权重的[min, max]之间线性间隔质心。这种初始化方法与权重的分布无关，与前两种方法相比最为分散。

items.en: Larger weights play a more important role than smaller weights (Han et al., 2015), but there are fewer of these large weights. Thus for both Forgy initialization and density-based initialization, very few centroids have large absolute value which results in poor representation of these few large weights. Linear initialization does not suffer from this problem. The experiment section compares the accuracy of different initialization methods after clustering and fine-tuning, showing that linear initialization works best.
items.zh: 较大的权重比较小的权重更重要（Han等人，2015），但这些大权重的数量较少。因此，对于Forgy初始化和基于密度的初始化，很少有质心具有较大的绝对值，导致对这些少数大权重的表示较差。线性初始化不存在这个问题。实验部分比较了聚类和微调后不同初始化方法的精度，表明线性初始化效果最好。

items.en: The centroids of the one-dimensional k-means clustering are the shared weights. There is one level of indirection during feed forward phase and back-propagation phase looking up the weight table. An index into the shared weight table is stored for each connection. During back-propagation, the gradient for each shared weight is calculated and used to update the shared weight. This procedure is shown in Figure 3.
items.zh: 一维k-means聚类的质心是共享权重。在前馈阶段和反向传播阶段，存在一级间接查找权重表。每个连接存储一个指向共享权重表的索引。在反向传播期间，计算每个共享权重的梯度并用于更新共享权重。该过程如图3所示。

items.en: We denote the loss by ℒℒ\cal{L}, the weight in the i𝑖ith column and j𝑗jth row by Wi​jsubscript𝑊𝑖𝑗W_{ij}, the centroid index of element Wi,jsubscript𝑊𝑖𝑗W_{i,j} by Ii​jsubscript𝐼𝑖𝑗I_{ij}, the k𝑘kth centroid of the layer by Cksubscript𝐶𝑘C_{k}. By using the indicator function 𝟙(.)\mathds{1}(.), the gradient of the centroids is calculated as:
items.zh: 我们用ℒ表示损失，第i列第j行的权重记为Wij，元素Wi,j的质心索引记为Iij，该层第k个质心记为Ck。通过使用指示函数𝟙(.)，质心的梯度计算如下：

items.capEn: Figure 5: Distribution for weight (Left) and index (Right). The distribution is biased.
items.capZh: 图5：权重（左）和索引（右）的分布。分布有偏。

items.en: A Huffman code is an optimal prefix code commonly used for lossless data compression(Van Leeuwen, 1976). It uses variable-length codewords to encode source symbols. The table is derived from the occurrence probability for each symbol. More common symbols are represented with fewer bits.
items.zh: 哈夫曼编码是一种最优前缀码，常用于无损数据压缩（Van Leeuwen, 1976）。它使用可变长码字对源符号进行编码。码表根据每个符号的出现概率推导得出。出现频率更高的符号用更少的比特表示。

items.en: We pruned, quantized, and Huffman encoded four networks: two on MNIST and two on ImageNet data-sets. The network parameters and accuracy-111Reference model is from Caffe model zoo, accuracy is measured without data augmentation before and after pruning are shown in Table 1. The compression pipeline saves network storage by 35×35\times to 49×49\times across different networks without loss of accuracy. The total size of AlexNet decreased from 240MB to 6.9MB, which is small enough to be put into on-chip SRAM, eliminating the need to store the model in energy-consuming DRAM memory.
items.zh: 我们对四个网络进行了剪枝、量化和哈夫曼编码：两个在 MNIST 数据集上，两个在 ImageNet 数据集上。网络参数和精度（参考模型来自 Caffe 模型库，精度在无数据增强下测量）在剪枝前后如表 1 所示。压缩流水线在不同网络上将网络存储减少了 35 倍到 49 倍，且未损失精度。AlexNet 的总大小从 240MB 减少到 6.9MB，小到足以放入片上 SRAM，从而无需将模型存储在能耗高的 DRAM 内存中。

items.en: Training is performed with the Caffe framework (Jia et al., 2014). Pruning is implemented by adding a mask to the blobs to mask out the update of the pruned connections. Quantization and weight sharing are implemented by maintaining a codebook structure that stores the shared weight, and group-by-index after calculating the gradient of each layer. Each shared weight is updated with all the gradients that fall into that bucket. Huffman coding doesn’t require training and is implemented offline after all the fine-tuning is finished.
items.zh: 训练使用 Caffe 框架（Jia 等人，2014）进行。剪枝通过向 blob 添加掩码来屏蔽剪枝连接的更新来实现。量化和权重共享通过维护一个存储共享权重的码本结构，并在计算每层梯度后按索引分组来实现。每个共享权重使用落入该桶的所有梯度进行更新。哈夫曼编码不需要训练，在所有微调完成后离线实现。

items.en: We first experimented on MNIST dataset with LeNet-300-100 and LeNet-5 network (LeCun et al., 1998). LeNet-300-100 is a fully connected network with two hidden layers, with 300 and 100 neurons each, which achieves 1.6% error rate on Mnist. LeNet-5 is a convolutional network that has two convolutional layers and two fully connected layers, which achieves 0.8% error rate on Mnist. Table 2 and table 3 show the statistics of the compression pipeline. The compression rate includes the overhead of the codebook and sparse indexes. Most of the saving comes from pruning and quantization (compressed 32×32\times), while Huffman coding gives a marginal gain (compressed 40×40\times)
items.zh: 我们首先在MNIST数据集上使用LeNet-300-100和LeNet-5网络进行了实验（LeCun等人，1998）。LeNet-300-100是一个全连接网络，有两个隐藏层，分别有300和100个神经元，在MNIST上实现了1.6%的错误率。LeNet-5是一个卷积网络，有两个卷积层和两个全连接层，在MNIST上实现了0.8%的错误率。表2和表3展示了压缩管道的统计数据。压缩率包括了码本和稀疏索引的开销。大部分压缩来自剪枝和量化（压缩了32×32倍），而霍夫曼编码带来了边际增益（压缩了40×40倍）。

items.en: We further examine the performance of Deep Compression on the ImageNet ILSVRC-2012 dataset, which has 1.2M training examples and 50k validation examples. We use the AlexNet Caffe model as the reference model, which has 61 million parameters and achieved a top-1 accuracy of 57.2% and a top-5 accuracy of 80.3%. Table 4 shows that AlexNet can be compressed to 2.88%percent2.882.88\% of its original size without impacting accuracy. There are 256 shared weights in each CONV layer, which are encoded with 8 bits, and 32 shared weights in each FC layer, which are encoded with only 5 bits. The relative sparse index is encoded with 4 bits. Huffman coding compressed additional 22%, resulting in 35×35\times compression in total.
items.zh: 我们进一步评估了Deep Compression在ImageNet ILSVRC-2012数据集上的性能，该数据集包含120万训练样本和5万验证样本。我们使用AlexNet Caffe模型作为参考模型，该模型有6100万个参数，top-1准确率为57.2%，top-5准确率为80.3%。表4显示，AlexNet可以压缩到原始大小的2.88%，而不影响准确率。每个卷积层有256个共享权重，用8位编码；每个全连接层有32个共享权重，仅用5位编码。相对稀疏索引用4位编码。霍夫曼编码额外压缩了22%，总计实现了35倍压缩。

items.en: With promising results on AlexNet, we also looked at a larger, more recent network, VGG-16 (Simonyan & Zisserman, 2014), on the same ILSVRC-2012 dataset. VGG-16 has far more convolutional layers but still only three fully-connected layers. Following a similar methodology, we aggressively compressed both convolutional and fully-connected layers to realize a significant reduction in the number of effective weights, shown in Table5.
items.zh: 在AlexNet上取得有希望的结果后，我们还在相同的ILSVRC-2012数据集上研究了一个更大、更新的网络VGG-16（Simonyan & Zisserman, 2014）。VGG-16拥有更多的卷积层，但仍然只有三个全连接层。遵循类似的方法，我们对卷积层和全连接层都进行了激进压缩，以实现有效权重数量的显著减少，如表5所示。

items.en: The VGG16 network as a whole has been compressed by 49×49\times. Weights in the CONV layers are represented with 8 bits, and FC layers use 5 bits, which does not impact the accuracy. The two largest fully-connected layers can each be pruned to less than 1.6% of their original size. This reduction is critical for real time image processing, where there is little reuse of these layers across images (unlike batch processing). This is also critical for fast object detection algorithms where one CONV pass is used by many FC passes. The reduced layers will fit in an on-chip SRAM and have modest bandwidth requirements. Without the reduction, the bandwidth requirements are prohibitive.
items.zh: 整个VGG16网络被压缩了49倍。卷积层的权重用8位表示，全连接层使用5位，这并不影响精度。两个最大的全连接层各自可以被剪枝到原始大小的1.6%以下。这种缩减对于实时图像处理至关重要，因为在这些应用中，这些层在不同图像之间几乎没有重用（与批处理不同）。这对于快速目标检测算法也至关重要，其中一次卷积传递被多次全连接传递使用。缩减后的层可以放入片上SRAM，并且带宽需求适中。如果没有缩减，带宽需求将是禁止性的。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Accuracy v.s. compression rate under different compression methods. Pruning and quantization works best when combined.
items.capZh: 图6：不同压缩方法下的精度与压缩率。剪枝和量化结合时效果最佳。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Pruning doesn’t hurt quantization. Dashed: quantization on unpruned network. Solid: quantization on pruned network; Accuracy begins to drop at the same number of quantization bits whether or not the network has been pruned. Although pruning made the number of parameters less, quantization still works well, or even better(3 bits case on the left figure) as in the unpruned network.
items.capZh: 图7：剪枝不影响量化。虚线：未剪枝网络的量化。实线：剪枝网络的量化；无论网络是否被剪枝，精度在相同的量化位数下开始下降。尽管剪枝减少了参数数量，量化仍然有效，甚至比未剪枝网络更好（左图中3位的情况）。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Accuracy of different initialization methods. Left: top-1 accuracy. Right: top-5 accuracy. Linear initialization gives best result.
items.capZh: 图8：不同初始化方法的精度。左：top-1精度。右：top-5精度。线性初始化效果最佳。

items.en: The three plots in Figure 7 show how accuracy drops with fewer bits per connection for CONV layers (left), FC layers (middle) and all layers (right). Each plot reports both top-1 and top-5 accuracy. Dashed lines only applied quantization but without pruning; solid lines did both quantization and pruning. There is very little difference between the two. This shows that pruning works well with quantization.
items.zh: 图7中的三个图显示了在CONV层（左）、FC层（中）和所有层（右）中，每个连接的比特数减少时准确率如何下降。每个图报告了top-1和top-5准确率。虚线仅应用量化而不进行剪枝；实线同时进行了量化和剪枝。两者之间差异很小。这表明剪枝与量化协同工作良好。

items.en: Quantization works well on pruned network because unpruned AlexNet has 60 million weights to quantize, while pruned AlexNet has only 6.7 million weights to quantize. Given the same amount of centroids, the latter has less error.
items.zh: 量化在剪枝后的网络上效果良好，因为未剪枝的AlexNet有6000万个权重需要量化，而剪枝后的AlexNet只有670万个权重需要量化。在质心数量相同的情况下，后者误差更小。

items.en: The first two plots in Figure 7 show that CONV layers require more bits of precision than FC layers. For CONV layers, accuracy drops significantly below 4 bits, while FC layer is more robust: not until 2 bits did the accuracy drop significantly.
items.zh: 图7中的前两个图显示，CONV层需要比FC层更高的精度。对于CONV层，低于4比特时准确率显著下降，而FC层更鲁棒：直到2比特时准确率才显著下降。

items.en: The initial centroids of linear initialization spread equally across the x-axis, from the min value to the max value. That helps to maintain the large weights as the large weights play a more important role than smaller ones, which is also shown in network pruning Han et al. (2015). Neither random nor density-based initialization retains large centroids. With these initialization methods, large weights are clustered to the small centroids because there are few large weights. In contrast, linear initialization allows large weights a better chance to form a large centroid.
items.zh: 线性初始化的初始质心在x轴上从最小值到最大值均匀分布。这有助于保留大权重，因为大权重比小权重更重要，这一点在网络剪枝Han等人(2015)中也有体现。随机初始化或基于密度的初始化都无法保留大质心。使用这些初始化方法时，大权重会被聚类到小质心，因为大权重数量很少。相比之下，线性初始化使大权重有更好的机会形成大质心。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Compared with the original network, pruned network layer achieved 3×3\times speedup on CPU, 3.5×3.5\times on GPU and 4.2×4.2\times on mobile GPU on average. Batch size = 1 targeting real time processing. Performance number normalized to CPU.
items.capZh: 图9：与原始网络相比，剪枝网络层在CPU上平均加速3×3倍，在GPU上加速3.5×3.5倍，在移动GPU上加速4.2×4.2倍。批量大小=1，面向实时处理。性能数值归一化到CPU。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Compared with the original network, pruned network layer takes 7×7\times less energy on CPU, 3.3×3.3\times less on GPU and 4.2×4.2\times less on mobile GPU on average. Batch size = 1 targeting real time processing. Energy number normalized to CPU.
items.capZh: 图10：与原始网络相比，剪枝网络层在CPU上平均节省7×7倍能量，在GPU上节省3.3×3.3倍，在移动GPU上节省4.2×4.2倍。批量大小=1，面向实时处理。能量数值归一化到CPU。

items.en: Deep Compression is targeting extremely latency-focused applications running on mobile, which requires real-time inference, such as pedestrian detection on an embedded processor inside an autonomous vehicle. Waiting for a batch to assemble significantly adds latency. So when bench-marking the performance and energy efficiency, we consider the case when batch size = 1. The cases of batching are given in Appendix A.
items.zh: 深度压缩针对的是运行在移动设备上、对延迟要求极高的应用，这些应用需要实时推理，例如自动驾驶汽车嵌入式处理器上的行人检测。等待批量组装会显著增加延迟。因此，在基准测试性能和能效时，我们考虑批大小为1的情况。批处理的情况见附录A。

items.en: Fully connected layer dominates the model size (more than 90%percent9090\%) and got compressed the most by Deep Compression (96%percent9696\% weights pruned in VGG-16). In state-of-the-art object detection algorithms such as fast R-CNN (Girshick, 2015), upto 38%percent3838\% computation time is consumed on FC layers on uncompressed model. So it’s interesting to benchmark on FC layers, to see the effect of Deep Compression on performance and energy. Thus we setup our benchmark on FC6, FC7, FC8 layers of AlexNet and VGG-16. In the non-batched case, the activation matrix is a vector with just one column, so the computation boils down to dense / sparse matrix-vector multiplication for original / pruned model, respectively. Since current BLAS library on CPU and GPU doesn’t support indirect look-up and relative indexing, we didn’t benchmark the quantized model.
items.zh: 全连接层主导了模型大小（超过90%），并且被深度压缩压缩得最多（VGG-16中96%的权重被剪枝）。在最新的目标检测算法（如Fast R-CNN (Girshick, 2015)）中，未压缩模型上全连接层的计算时间高达38%。因此，对全连接层进行基准测试以观察深度压缩对性能和能耗的影响是很有意义的。因此，我们在AlexNet和VGG-16的FC6、FC7、FC8层上设置了基准测试。在非批处理情况下，激活矩阵是只有一个列向量的向量，因此计算分别归结为原始模型的稠密矩阵-向量乘法和剪枝模型的稀疏矩阵-向量乘法。由于当前CPU和GPU上的BLAS库不支持间接查找和相对索引，我们没有对量化模型进行基准测试。

items.en: We compare three different off-the-shelf hardware: the NVIDIA GeForce GTX Titan X and the Intel Core i7 5930K as desktop processors (same package as NVIDIA Digits Dev Box) and NVIDIA Tegra K1 as mobile processor. To run the benchmark on GPU, we used cuBLAS GEMV for the original dense layer. For the pruned sparse layer, we stored the sparse matrix in in CSR format, and used cuSPARSE CSRMV kernel, which is optimized for sparse matrix-vector multiplication on GPU. To run the benchmark on CPU, we used MKL CBLAS GEMV for the original dense model and MKL SPBLAS CSRMV for the pruned sparse model.
items.zh: 我们比较了三种不同的现成硬件：NVIDIA GeForce GTX Titan X和Intel Core i7 5930K作为桌面处理器（与NVIDIA Digits Dev Box相同封装），以及NVIDIA Tegra K1作为移动处理器。为了在GPU上运行基准测试，我们对原始稠密层使用了cuBLAS GEMV。对于剪枝后的稀疏层，我们将稀疏矩阵以CSR格式存储，并使用cuSPARSE CSRMV内核，该内核针对GPU上的稀疏矩阵-向量乘法进行了优化。为了在CPU上运行基准测试，我们对原始稠密模型使用了MKL CBLAS GEMV，对剪枝后的稀疏模型使用了MKL SPBLAS CSRMV。

items.en: To compare power consumption between different systems, it is important to measure power at a consistent manner (NVIDIA, b). For our analysis, we are comparing pre-regulation power of the entire application processor (AP) / SOC and DRAM combined. On CPU, the benchmark is running on single socket with a single Haswell-E class Core i7-5930K processor. CPU socket and DRAM power are as reported by the pcm-power utility provided by Intel. For GPU, we used nvidia-smi utility to report the power of Titan X. For mobile GPU, we use a Jetson TK1 development board and measured the total power consumption with a power-meter. We assume 15%percent1515\% AC to DC conversion loss, 85%percent8585\% regulator efficiency and 15%percent1515\% power consumed by peripheral components (NVIDIA, a) to report the AP+DRAM power for Tegra K1.
items.zh: 为了比较不同系统之间的功耗，以一致的方式测量功率非常重要（NVIDIA, b）。在我们的分析中，我们比较了整个应用处理器（AP）/片上系统（SOC）和DRAM的预调节功率之和。在CPU上，基准测试在单个插槽上运行，使用单个Haswell-E类Core i7-5930K处理器。CPU插槽和DRAM功率由Intel提供的pcm-power工具报告。对于GPU，我们使用nvidia-smi工具报告Titan X的功率。对于移动GPU，我们使用Jetson TK1开发板，并通过功率计测量总功耗。我们假设15%的交流到直流转换损耗、85%的稳压器效率和15%的外围组件功耗（NVIDIA, a），以报告Tegra K1的AP+DRAM功率。

items.en: The ratio of memory access over computation characteristic with and without batching is different. When the input activations are batched to a matrix the computation becomes matrix-matrix multiplication, where locality can be improved by blocking. Matrix could be blocked to fit in caches and reused efficiently. In this case, the amount of memory access is O​(n2)𝑂superscript𝑛2O(n^{2}), and that of computation is O​(n3)𝑂superscript𝑛3O(n^{3}), the ratio between memory access and computation is in the order of 1/n1𝑛1/n.
items.zh: 有批处理和无批处理时，内存访问与计算的比例不同。当输入激活被批处理成矩阵时，计算变为矩阵-矩阵乘法，可以通过分块改善局部性。矩阵可以分块以适应缓存并高效重用。在这种情况下，内存访问量为O(n²)，计算量为O(n³)，内存访问与计算的比例约为1/n。

items.en: In real time processing when batching is not allowed, the input activation is a single vector and the computation is matrix-vector multiplication. In this case, the amount of memory access is O​(n2)𝑂superscript𝑛2O(n^{2}), and the computation is O​(n2)𝑂superscript𝑛2O(n^{2}), memory access and computation are of the same magnitude (as opposed to 1/n1𝑛1/n). That indicates MV is more memory-bounded than MM. So reducing the memory footprint is critical for the non-batching case.
items.zh: 在实时处理中，当不允许批处理时，输入激活是单个向量，计算是矩阵-向量乘法。在这种情况下，内存访问量为O(n²)，计算量为O(n²)，内存访问和计算处于同一数量级（与1/n相反）。这表明矩阵-向量乘法比矩阵-矩阵乘法更受内存限制。因此，减少内存占用对于非批处理情况至关重要。

items.en: In those latency-tolerating applications , batching improves memory locality, where weights could be blocked and reused in matrix-matrix multiplication. In this scenario, pruned network no longer shows its advantage. We give detailed timing results in Appendix A.
items.zh: 在那些容忍延迟的应用中，批处理改善了内存局部性，权重可以在矩阵-矩阵乘法中被分块和重用。在这种情况下，剪枝后的网络不再显示其优势。我们在附录A中给出了详细的时间结果。

full.sec: 6.4 Ratio of Weights, Index and Codebook
full.secZh: 6.4 权重、索引和码本的比率

items.en: Pruning makes the weight matrix sparse, so extra space is needed to store the indexes of non-zero elements. Quantization adds storage for a codebook. The experiment section has already included these two factors. Figure 11 shows the breakdown of three different components when quantizing four networks. Since on average both the weights and the sparse indexes are encoded with 5 bits, their storage is roughly half and half. The overhead of codebook is very small and often negligible.
items.zh: 剪枝使权重矩阵稀疏化，因此需要额外空间存储非零元素的索引。量化则增加了码本的存储。实验部分已包含这两个因素。图11展示了量化四个网络时三种不同组件的分解情况。由于平均而言权重和稀疏索引均以5比特编码，它们的存储大致各占一半。码本的开销非常小，通常可忽略不计。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Storage ratio of weight, index and codebook.
items.capZh: 图11：权重、索引和码本的存储比例。

items.en: Neural networks are typically over-parametrized, and there is significant redundancy for deep learning models(Denil et al., 2013). This results in a waste of both computation and memory usage. There have been various proposals to remove the redundancy: Vanhoucke et al. (2011) explored a fixed-point implementation with 8-bit integer (vs 32-bit floating point) activations. Hwang & Sung (2014) proposed an optimization method for the fixed-point network with ternary weights and 3-bit activations. Anwar et al. (2015) quantized the neural network using L2 error minimization and achieved better accuracy on MNIST and CIFAR-10 datasets.Denton et al. (2014) exploited the linear structure of the neural network by finding an appropriate low-rank approximation of the parameters and keeping the accuracy within 1% of the original model.
items.zh: 神经网络通常过度参数化，深度学习模型存在显著冗余（Denil et al., 2013）。这导致计算和内存使用上的浪费。已有多种消除冗余的方案：Vanhoucke et al. (2011) 探索了使用8位整数（相对于32位浮点）激活的定点实现。Hwang & Sung (2014) 提出了一种针对三元权重和3位激活的定点网络优化方法。Anwar et al. (2015) 使用L2误差最小化对神经网络进行量化，在MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上取得了更好的精度。Denton et al. (2014) 通过寻找参数合适的低秩近似，利用神经网络的线性结构，将精度保持在原始模型的1%以内。

items.en: The empirical success in this paper is consistent with the theoretical study of random-like sparse networks with +1/0/-1 weights (Arora et al., 2014), which have been proved to enjoy nice properties (e.g. reversibility), and to allow a provably polynomial time algorithm for training.
items.zh: 本文中的实证成功与对具有+1/0/-1权重的随机类稀疏网络的理论研究（Arora et al., 2014）一致，这些网络已被证明具有良好的性质（例如可逆性），并允许可证明的多项式时间训练算法。

items.en: Much work has been focused on binning the network parameters into buckets, and only the values in the buckets need to be stored. HashedNets(Chen et al., 2015) reduce model sizes by using a hash function to randomly group connection weights, so that all connections within the same hash bucket share a single parameter value. In their method, the weight binning is pre-determined by the hash function, instead of being learned through training, which doesn’t capture the nature of images. Gong et al. (2014) compressed deep convnets using vector quantization, which resulted in 1% accuracy loss. Both methods studied only the fully connected layer, ignoring the convolutional layers.
items.zh: 许多工作集中于将网络参数分桶，只需存储桶中的值。HashedNets（Chen et al., 2015）通过使用哈希函数随机分组连接权重来减小模型大小，使得同一哈希桶内的所有连接共享一个参数值。在该方法中，权重分桶由哈希函数预先确定，而非通过训练学习，这未能捕捉图像的本质。Gong et al. (2014) 使用向量量化压缩深度卷积网络，导致1%的精度损失。这两种方法仅研究了全连接层，忽略了卷积层。

items.en: There have been other attempts to reduce the number of parameters of neural networks by replacing the fully connected layer with global average pooling. The Network in Network architecture(Lin et al., 2013) and GoogLenet(Szegedy et al., 2014) achieves state-of-the-art results on several benchmarks by adopting this idea. However, transfer learning, i.e. reusing features learned on the ImageNet dataset and applying them to new tasks by only fine-tuning the fully connected layers, is more difficult with this approach. This problem is noted by Szegedy et al. (2014) and motivates them to add a linear layer on the top of their networks to enable transfer learning.
items.zh: 还有其他尝试通过用全局平均池化替代全连接层来减少神经网络参数数量。Network in Network架构（Lin et al., 2013）和GoogLenet（Szegedy et al., 2014）通过采用这一思想在多个基准上取得了最先进的结果。然而，迁移学习（即重用ImageNet数据集上学习的特征，并通过仅微调全连接层将其应用于新任务）在这种方法下更加困难。Szegedy et al. (2014) 指出了这一问题，并促使他们在网络顶部添加一个线性层以实现迁移学习。

items.en: Network pruning has been used both to reduce network complexity and to reduce over-fitting. An early approach to pruning was biased weight decay (Hanson & Pratt, 1989). Optimal Brain Damage (LeCun et al., 1989) and Optimal Brain Surgeon (Hassibi et al., 1993) prune networks to reduce the number of connections based on the Hessian of the loss function and suggest that such pruning is more accurate than magnitude-based pruning such as weight decay. A recent work (Han et al., 2015) successfully pruned several state of the art large scale networks and showed that the number of parameters could be reduce by an order of magnitude. There are also attempts to reduce the number of activations for both compression and acceleration Van Nguyen et al. (2015).
items.zh: 网络剪枝已被用于降低网络复杂性和减少过拟合。早期的剪枝方法是有偏权重衰减（Hanson & Pratt, 1989）。最优脑损伤（LeCun et al., 1989）和最优脑外科（Hassibi et al., 1993）基于损失函数的Hessian矩阵剪枝网络以减少连接数量，并表明这种剪枝比基于幅度的剪枝（如权重衰减）更精确。最近的工作（Han et al., 2015）成功剪枝了多个最先进的大规模网络，并表明参数数量可以减少一个数量级。也有尝试减少激活数量以实现压缩和加速（Van Nguyen et al., 2015）。

items.en: While the pruned network has been benchmarked on various hardware, the quantized network with weight sharing has not, because off-the-shelf cuSPARSE or MKL SPBLAS library does not support indirect matrix entry lookup, nor is the relative index in CSC or CSR format supported. So the full advantage of Deep Compression that fit the model in cache is not fully unveiled. A software solution is to write customized GPU kernels that support this. A hardware solution is to build custom ASIC architecture specialized to traverse the sparse and quantized network structure, which also supports customized quantization bit width. We expect this architecture to have energy dominated by on-chip SRAM access instead of off-chip DRAM access.
items.zh: 虽然剪枝后的网络已在多种硬件上进行了基准测试，但带有权重共享的量化网络尚未进行此类测试，因为现成的 cuSPARSE 或 MKL SPBLAS 库不支持间接矩阵条目查找，也不支持 CSC 或 CSR 格式中的相对索引。因此，深度压缩将模型适配到缓存中的全部优势尚未完全展现。一种软件解决方案是编写支持此功能的定制 GPU 内核。一种硬件解决方案是构建定制的 ASIC 架构，专门用于遍历稀疏和量化的网络结构，并支持定制的量化位宽。我们预计这种架构的能耗将主要由片上 SRAM 访问而非片外 DRAM 访问主导。

items.en: We have presented “Deep Compression” that compressed neural networks without affecting accuracy. Our method operates by pruning the unimportant connections, quantizing the network using weight sharing, and then applying Huffman coding. We highlight our experiments on AlexNet which reduced the weight storage by 35×35\times without loss of accuracy. We show similar results for VGG-16 and LeNet networks compressed by 49×49\times and 39×39\times without loss of accuracy. This leads to smaller storage requirement of putting convnets into mobile app. After Deep Compression the size of these networks fit into on-chip SRAM cache (5pJ/access) rather than requiring off-chip DRAM memory (640pJ/access). This potentially makes deep neural networks more energy efficient to run on mobile. Our compression method also facilitates the use of complex neural networks in mobile applications where application size and download bandwidth are constrained.
items.zh: 我们提出了“深度压缩”技术，该技术在不影响准确率的情况下压缩神经网络。我们的方法通过剪枝不重要的连接、使用权重共享量化网络，然后应用霍夫曼编码来实现。我们重点展示了在AlexNet上的实验，该实验将权重存储减少了35倍，且没有损失准确率。我们展示了VGG-16和LeNet网络的类似结果，分别压缩了49倍和39倍，且没有损失准确率。这导致将卷积神经网络放入移动应用所需的存储空间更小。经过深度压缩后，这些网络的大小适合放入片上SRAM缓存（5pJ/访问），而不需要片外DRAM内存（640pJ/访问）。这可能使深度神经网络在移动设备上运行时更加节能。我们的压缩方法还促进了在应用大小和下载带宽受限的移动应用中使用复杂神经网络。
